name: Lemony Beef Shanks
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 pounds red potatoes, scrubbed into 1-inch cubes
2 1/2 to 2 3/4 pounds beef shank, trimmed of fat (can be bonelss)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3 1/2 quart electric slow cooker, mix together the beer and tomato paste.
2. Whisk in the flour, salt, pepper, and garlic until well-blended.
3. Stir in the onion, mushrooms, carrots, and potatoes. Add the beef shanks and push down into the vegetable mixture.
4. Cover and cook on Low heat setting for 8 1/2-9 hours or until the beef and potatoes are tender.
5. Stir in the lemon zest and lemon juice just before serving.
